hero.title: Märsta Car House
hero.tagline: Authorized Hyundai workshop and expert on all car brands

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Over 45 years of automotive expertise in the heart of Arlandastad

expertise.title: Expertise you can trust
expertise.description: Since the mid-70s, Märsta Car House has been a reliable partner for car owners in the Stockholm area. As an authorized service workshop for Hyundai and Aixam, we combine official warranty service with expertise in all car brands.

uniqueLocation.title: Unique location in Arlandastad
uniqueLocation.description: Leave your car for service while you travel abroad

warranty.title: Preserved manufacturer warranty
warranty.description: Service of all brands without affecting the warranty

certified.title: Certified technicians
certified.description: Continuous training in the car's latest technology

locationHighlight.title: Strategically located in Arlandastad
locationHighlight.description: Our unique location near Arlanda airport makes us the perfect choice for travelers. Leave your car for service while you're away – we take care of everything while you're gone.

company.name: Märsta
company.description: Your reliable partner for car service and sales in Arlandastad since the mid-70s.

meta.homeDescription: Welcome to Märsta Bilhus, your reliable partner for cars and service. We offer a wide range of new and used cars, as well as professional service and repair.
